creator: bsdcode@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 248476
patch

- use GCC until issue https://github.com/gemrb/gemrb/issues/1786 is fixed
- add OPENGL option for accelerated rendering and enable it by default
- expose upstream option for pixelscaling to screensize and disable it by default
- change GemRB.cfg to a proper conffile
- set some build options explicitly
- use CMAKE helpers for boolean options in Makefile
